Title: Gravity Falls
Actors: Jason Ritter, Alex Hirsch, Kristen Schaal
Plot: When Dipper and Mabel Pines get sent to their great-uncle Stan's shop in Gravity Falls, Oregon for the summer, they think it will be boring. But when Dipper find a strange journal in the woods, they learn some strange secrets about the town and its strange inhabitants.
Awards: Won 2 Primetime Emmys. 13 wins & 38 nominations total
